title: Da hält die Welt den Atem an
actors: Marcella Albani, Sandra Milovanoff, Werner Krauss
plot: Bruce Wilton, middle-aged, rich and famous, as a producer, has been rejected by Ada von Ruyt, a revue star. Finding an affection is developing between her and Longard, now down and out, he arranges to send the man to South America...
